text: PROVIDENCE HEALTH AND SERVICES OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON PROVIDENCE WALK IN CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 10566 SE Washington Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age four months and older Hours: 7 days per week 8am-8pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and private insurances. Discounts, financial assistance, and payment plans may be available for uninsured patients.
